The white delineator post (bollard) on the right side of the road features a small rectangular reflector, which is highly characteristic of Spanish road infrastructure. The guardrail design and the specific style of the chevron signs are also very common across Spain.
Portugal uses similar white delineator posts and guardrail systems. However, the specific proportions and reflector placement on the bollard are more typical of Spain.
